algorithm: latency = max(50.0ms, P95_RTT x 2.0) | cpu = max(40.0%, P95_CPU x 2.5)

notes.latency_floor_reason: Docker LAN baseline P95 RTT is <1ms. Raw multiplier would produce sub-millisecond thresholds triggering on any network noise. 50ms floor ensures only real WAN degradation (>50ms) triggers a switch.
notes.cpu_floor_reason: R1 stress test (2026-03-04) found psutil reads system-wide CPU across 8 host cores. Single-core container stress produces ~12% system-wide. 80% hardcoded threshold was unreachable. 40% floor is above normal noise (P95=5.3%) and reachable under real workload pressure.
